productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Hex Run White Shoe
description: These hi-tech reebok Hex Run shoes are designed to keep to offer maximum stability and support while you indulge in your favourite sport. Be it cricket, Basketball, running or long distance cardio walks, the HexRide technology offers lightweight cushioning for your feet. Stylish and comfortable, wear this with performance clothes when playing Sports, or team it with jeans or shorts and t-shirts for that casual look.Upper Synthetic and mesh upper made of SmoothFit technology Mesh tongue and collar with textile lining for excellent snug Fit Perforations on the tongue to enable breathability Fabric panel on the tongue with branding Central lacing for snug fit Synthetic overlay on the heel cup with branding Midsole Removable PU sockliner to replace with an orthotic Soft, cushy phylon footbed for lightweight comfort Inbuilt full foot HexRide technology and Pump P105 Internal offering custom fit EVA midsole for greater durability and comfort Outsole High-abrasion rubber outsole for increased durability Scooped heel with transparent encasing of the midsole Outsole in bee-hive pattern, with some grooves inversely scooped, to offer superior traction Waffle pattern on the periphery of the outsole, below the forefoot and the heel for excellent grip Rubber outsole extended to the toe box and embedded onto it for durability and forefoot protection shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
